mnemonics: PICKLE jars preserve food for later. Python PICKLE preserves objects for later.
keyPoints: Pickle is used for serializing and deserializing Python object structures
It converts complex objects into a byte stream for storage or transmission
The byte stream can be saved to a file or sent over a network and reconstructed later
commonMistakes: Trying to unpickle data from an untrusted source (security risk)
Forgetting to open files in binary mode ('wb' for writing, 'rb' for reading)
Assuming pickled objects will work across different Python versions or environments
